name: patent-search
label: Patent Researcher
description: Focus on IP risk, prior art claims, and patent landscape
questions: Are there any existing patents related to this innovation?
What is the patent landscape in this technology area?
Are there any pending patent applications we should know about?
What prior art could invalidate potential patents?
What IP claims do competitors already hold?
Are there any expired patents that are now freely available?
What licensing restrictions should we be aware of?
